anatomy.notes: No background, border, or border-radius — pure text row. Icon L and Icon R are optional slot properties (not variant axes). Icon placeholder size is 16×16px for both sizes.

tokens.body/s-medium: Font(family: Inter, weight: 500, size: 12, lineHeight: 1.4, letterSpacing: 0)
tokens.body/l-medium: Font(family: Inter, weight: 500, size: 16, lineHeight: 1.4, letterSpacing: 0)

accessibility.notes: Neither size meets the WCAG 44px touch target — known deviation. No focused state exists in the Figma component set.

validation: No background fill, border, or border-radius on any variant
size=s: 12px body/s-medium text, size=m: 16px body/l-medium text
Icon placeholders are 16px × 16px for both sizes
Gap between icon and label is 4px
disabled states use system/fg/disabled (#cad5e2) and system/fg/disabled-inverse (#45556c)
hover state text is darker than idle (fg-hover vs fg-idle)
pressed/active text color matches idle (#45556c) — pressed darkens via overlay, not token change
Both sizes (~17px and ~22px) are below WCAG 44px touch target — known deviation, do not fail validation
